reasoning_chain: The road features a solid yellow centerline and white edge lines, consistent with Brazilian highway standards for two-lane rural roads.
White reflective posts (catenárias) line both sides of the road, commonly used in Brazil to mark road edges in low-visibility areas.
The landscape shows open grasslands with scattered trees and a distant pine plantation, typical of southern Brazil’s rural regions like Rio Grande do Sul.
